REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 210, DEFENDANT JAMES CHAN'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED AS FOLLOWS: CAUSES OF ACTION 9, 10 AND 11 ARE ABATED AND STAYED PENDING THE RESOLUTION OF PREVIOUSLY FILED PROBATE MATTER. UPON THE RESOLUTION OF THE PROBATE MATTER, DEPENDING ON THE OUTCOME, PLAINTIFF MAY FILE AN AMENDED COMPLAINT IF NECESSARY AND PROPER TO PROCEED WITH THESE CAUSES OF ACTION. PREVAILING/MOVING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IS VERBATIM WITH THE COURT'S RULING AND IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312.JUDGE: VEDICA PURI, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (210/VP)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Mar-30-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JAMES CHAN's DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Amended Complaint is sustained as follows: causes of action 9, 10 and 11 are abated and stayed pending the resolution of previously filed probate matter. Upon the resolution of the probate matter, depending on the outcome, Plaintiff may file an amended complaint if necessary and proper to proceed with these causes of action. Prevailing/Moving party to submit a proposed order that is verbatim with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CRC 3.1312.Judge: Vedica Puri, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (210/VP)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
